outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative GEX (-8.76B) amplifies price movements. Dealers short gamma will accelerate selloffs if support breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot at critical 630 RESONANCE support. Massive PUT OI across all expiries creates structural floor. Negative GEX environment means volatility expansion likely. 0DTE shows bullish skew (reverse_smirk) while WEEKLY/MONTHLY are bearish (smirk) - term structure divergence. Break of 630 triggers dealer selling cascade. Upside capped by 655 CALL WALL.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Spot at structural support. 112,985 OI MONTHLY + 67,487 OI WEEKLY + 11,379 OI/440K VOL 0DTE. Massive volume indicates intense MM hedging. Dealers short puts must defend or accelerate selling.
0DTE Max Pain level where option value minimized. Also significant CALL OI cluster (31,663). MM target for pin risk. Distance 2% from spot - moderate attraction strength.
Strong secondary support across all expiries. 59,750 OI WEEKLY + 33,275 OI MONTHLY + 14,200 OI 0DTE. Critical floor if 630 fails. PCR 3.60 MONTHLY confirms bearish hedging.
Highest CALL OI in 0DTE at 48,932. Major upside resistance. Dealers short calls will sell into strength, capping rallies. Reverse smirk skew (0.83) confirms expensive calls.
103,422 OI MONTHLY + 13,544 OI WEEKLY. ITM puts create dealer hedging friction above spot. Negative GEX amplifies moves through this zone. Pivot between support and resistance.
46,677 OI 0DTE + 16,934 OI MONTHLY. Secondary resistance before 655 wall. High volume in 0DTE (25,850) confirms active trading interest.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: EXTREME: Combined negative GEX (-24.48B) across all expiries creates volatility amplification. Dealers short gamma will accelerate any directional move.
outlook.summary: Market faces severe negative gamma exposure (-24.48B total) creating volatile conditions. Heavy institutional put hedging (PCR 3.36 monthly, 2.72 weekly) dominates positioning. 0DTE reverse_smirk (0.79) shows short-term bullish call buying, but WEEKLY/MONTHLY smirk (1.24) confirms bearish macro sentiment. Spot at 6379 tests critical 6375-6400 support confluence. Break below triggers acceleration toward 6300.

levels.motivazione: Multi-expiry structural resistance across ALL expiries: 0DTE CALL OI 4886, WEEKLY total OI 5129, MONTHLY combined OI 34054 (PUT 24121 + CALL 9933). Weekly Max Pain alignment. Ultimate ceiling.
Multi-expiry support: MONTHLY PUT OI 23645 (#2 ranked), WEEKLY PUT OI 3650 (#3), 0DTE PUT OI 4693 with VOL 35628. Key structural anchor below spot.
0DTE dominant CALL OI 7180 (highest CALL). Aligns with Max Pain 6495 (+1.82% from spot). Bears face resistance at MM target zone.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL ZONE: Max Pain magnet active

levels.motivazione: WEEKLY highest PUT OI 5637 + 0DTE PUT OI 2223 with VOL 43562 (19.6x Vol/OI). Spot currently testing this level. Immediate battle zone.
0DTE PUT with extreme VOL 97062 vs OI 4077 (23.8x ratio). Highest volume concentration. Intraday price magnet with violent swings expected.
0DTE highest PUT OI 6464 with VOL 75125 (11.6x). MONTHLY PUT OI 18524 confirms structural support. Negative GEX acceleration target if 6350 breaks.
Multi-expiry deep support: 0DTE PUT OI 6446, WEEKLY PUT OI 3211, MONTHLY PUT OI 19313. Crash protection level. Last line of defense.
